news.title: No child can be forced to recite Hindu prayers, rules Chhattisgarh High Court after row over govt order
news.excerpt: The court told the petitioners to approach it again if they found that any child was being forced to recite religious hymns.

news.title: In A First, Probe Agency ED Auctions Private Jet For Rs 3 Crore
news.excerpt: The jet was seized as part of a probe into Rs 792-crore Ponzi scheme.

news.title: "Judges Cannot Be Threatened For Their Verdicts": Madhya Pradesh High Court
news.excerpt: Calling the threats a direct attack on the justice delivery system, a Division Bench of Justice Vivek Agarwal and Justice Avnindra Kumar Singh observe

news.title: Expired Food Racket Busted In Delhi, Products Worth Over Rs 20 Lakh Seized
news.excerpt: The seized products included soft drinks, health drinks, instant noodles, ghee and packaged juices.
